purpose: Self-authored cylinder D30 x L50 with 3 mm fillets on both rim edges. Acceptance fixture proving filleted cylinders still classify as cylinder, not box.

source.name: CadQuery generated by Claude for issue 004

groundTruth.method: CadQuery source dimensions. Volume recorded as nominal-cylinder value; fillet bite is ignored because shapeAnalysis classifies from side-wall geometry, not volume.
